hindi: जय श्री काल भैरव नाथ। काशी के कोतवाल विख्यात॥
english: Victory to Kaal Bhairav Nath; renowned guardian of Kashi
roman: Jai Shri Kaal Bhairav Nath, Kashi Ke Kotwal Vikhyat

hindi: जय जय भैरव काल भैरव। शिव के रुद्र रूप महाभैरव॥
english: Victory to Bhairav, Kaal Bhairav; the great Bhairav who is the Rudra form of Shiva
roman: Jai Jai Bhairav Kaal Bhairav, Shiv Ke Rudra Roop Mahabhairav

hindi: काशी में विराजत काल भैरव। भूत प्रेत भगाते क्षण में भैरव॥
english: Kaal Bhairav dwells in Kashi; he drives away ghosts and spirits in an instant
roman: Kashi Mein Virajat Kaal Bhairav, Bhoot Pret Bhagate Kshan Mein Bhairav

hindi: कुत्ते की सवारी, मद्य प्रिय। तांत्रिकों के इष्ट देव नय॥
english: He rides a dog, fond of wine; the chosen deity of tantric practitioners
roman: Kutte Ki Savari Madya Priya, Tantrikin Ke Isht Dev Naya

hindi: भैरव नाम सुनते भय भागे। शत्रु नाश होते अनुरागे॥
english: Hearing the name of Bhairav fear flees; enemies are destroyed with devotion
roman: Bhairav Naam Sunte Bhay Bhaage, Shatru Nash Hote Anurage

hindi: भैरव चालीसा जो पढ़ता। भय और शत्रु से कभी न डरता॥
english: Whoever reads the Bhairav Chalisa; never fears enemies or fear itself
roman: Bhairav Chalisa Jo Padhta, Bhay Aur Shatru Se Kabhi Na Darata

hindi: जय जय भैरव महाकाल। शरण आए की रक्षा करो तत्काल॥
english: Victory to Bhairav Mahakala; immediately protect those who take your shelter
roman: Jai Jai Bhairav Mahakaal, Sharan Aaye Ki Raksha Karo Tatkaal
